title: September 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 4''' is the 247th day of the year (248th in leap years). There are 118 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[Craig Claiborne]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Jeffery Kissoon]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[John DiMaggio]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 132|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 132]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Richard Marquand]] dies.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars Box Set]]'' published.
*1996 – [[Shadows of the Empire 5|''Shadows of the Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] published at newsstands.
*[[2002]] – [[Empire 1|''Empire'' 1]] published.
*2002 – [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 4|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 4]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 36]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars Insider 136|''Star Wars Insider'' 136]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'' released.
*2013 – ''[[The Not-So Magnificent Seven]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Draw Star Wars Rebels]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – "[[Force Friday]]" – Stores around the world open at midnight with a celebration of ''[[Star Wars]]'' and the release of numerous products related to [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].
*2015 – [[Journey to Star Wars: The Force Awakens|Journey to ''Star Wars: The Force Awakens'']] begins:
**[[Aftermath (novel)|''Aftermath'']] published.
**''[[Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure]]'' published.
**''[[Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure]]'' published.
**''[[The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure]]'' published.
**''[[Lost Stars]]'' published.
**''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]'' published.
**''[[Star Wars: Ships of the Galaxy]]'' published.
**[[Star Wars Look and Find (Journey to Star Wars: The Force Awakens)|''Star Wars Look and Find'']] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Cinestory Comic]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple 1|''Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 71|''Star Wars'' (2015) 71]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[The Acolyte - Kelnacca 1|''The Acolyte - Kelnacca'' 1]] published.
*2024 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures: Crash and Burn]]'' published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear 1|''The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fears'' 1]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles (second edition)]]'' published in the UK.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' released on the [[Star Wars video games|Nintendo Switch 2]].
